---
title: "Applied Statistics for Engineering"
subtitle: "Statistical methods for evidence-based engineering"
toc: true
---

# Engineering Statistics

## Purpose

This project presents practical statistical methods that support evidence-based engineering decisions using environmental and engineering data.

## Topics

Future topics include:

- Descriptive statistics
- Exploratory data analysis
- Probability distributions
- Confidence intervals
- Hypothesis testing
- Regression
- Correlation
- Reliability analysis
- Time-series analysis
- Data visualization
- Uncertainty analysis
- Practical interpretation

## Audience

- Engineers
- Scientists
- Students
- Researchers

## Guiding Principle

Statistical analysis should improve engineering understanding rather than simply produce numerical results.
